prompt: Create an ultra-realistic candid editorial photograph of a young woman with long wavy brown hair, medium warm skin tone, and a calm neutral expression standing beside a large apartment window during sunset. She is centered in a medium portrait from the hips up, looking directly at the camera with relaxed posture. She wears an oversized black retro American football jersey with large cream-and-red number 32 on the front, red-orange sleeve stripes, and a small NFL shield at the collar, tucked loosely into blue jeans, with a delicate small necklace. Warm golden sunlight streams through the tall window on the left, creating strong backlight, soft haze, lens flare, and glowing highlights in her hair. The room is a casual apartment gathering or party at golden hour: blurred people in the background on the right, one standing with their back to camera, others talking near a lamp; a warm table lamp glows in the distance, posters and soft interior shadows are visible. On the window sill in the lower left, include exactly 3 visible objects: one brown beer bottle, one red plastic cup, and one small dark dropper bottle. Use cinematic natural light, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, subtle film grain, warm amber color grading, candid editorial composition, 35mm photography feel, high dynamic range, no artificial retouching, no extra text or watermark.
